name: World Health Organization
description: A light-blue field bearing the WHO emblem in the centre — the UN azimuthal world map encircled by olive branches, with a Rod of Asclepius (snake-entwined staff) superimposed — beneath or above the lettering 'WHO'.
history: The World Health Organization was established on 7 April 1948. Its flag combines the UN emblem with the Rod of Asclepius — the traditional symbol of medicine.

features.role: WHO emblem (UN map with Rod of Asclepius)
